Kennidy.L.Guimaraes Kennidy-L-Guimaraes X kennidyl.guimaraes

Kennidy L. Guimarães

Writer and software developer

I am a software developer and writer, currently studying Computer Science at Italo-Brazilian University. My work is focused on the design and development of reliable software systems, with a particular interest in software architecture, domain modeling, and long-term system maintainability.

I am particularly interested in applying architectural principles such as Clean Architecture, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), and the MVC pattern to build durable and well-structured systems. My projects focus on clear domain boundaries, separation of concerns, and maintainable codebases designed to evolve over time.

Alongside my development work, I maintain academic interests in Mathematical Sciences, Cryptography, and Linguistics, areas that influence my approach to problem-solving, system design, and algorithmic thinking.

Between 2022 and 2025, I worked as an instructor at a vocational school, where I taught introductory courses in Logic, Algorithms, and Artificial Intelligence. During this period, I also delivered lectures in public and state schools across Southern Brazil, including the Santa Catarina Military Police School.

In 2025, I presented lectures on recent advances in Artificial Intelligence for students in the public education system, contributing to initiatives aimed at expanding access to technological education.

Outside formal activities, I dedicate part of my time to research, technical writing, and software development. Below you can follow my most recent commits and projects.
